Note:
WH40K TTS Mod — Global script that adds to any Warhammer 40K table:

  🎲 Dice Roller  — panel + Dice Mat auto-announce
  ⚔ Attack       — Hit→Wound→Save→Damage calculator
  🛡 Save         — armour save roller
  💀 Battleshock  — morale / Battleshock test
  ⏱ Turn Tracker — 6 WH40K phases with round counter
  ❤ Wound Tracker — model-aware HP (damage fills front model first)
  👥 Teams        — FFA / 2v1 / 2v2 / 3v2 / 3v3 / 3-Team formats
  📜 Yelloscribe  — in-game browser to yelloscribe.com
  ⚙ FTC Compat   — full Free the Codex integration (auto-detected)
  ❓ Help         — scrollable in-game help panel

HOW TO ADD TO YOUR OWN TABLE
────────────────────────────
1. Open this save (or your own WH40K table).
2. Modding → Scripting Editor → click Global.
3. If adding to your own table: copy the full script from here and
   paste it into your table's Global slot, then Save & Play.
4. (Optional) Tag any flat object DiceMat for dice auto-announce.
5. (FTC) Load FTC first — this script detects it automatically.
   Click ⚙ FTC or type !ftcimport to pull FTC units into HP tracker.

Type !help in chat or click ❓ Help in the toolbar for full reference.
Source & README: https://github.com/your-repo/wh40k-tts-mod
